data.content: Implementation complete. Added reset audit counters button to Settings > Defaults with AlertDialog confirmation. DELETE /api/lease-audit truncates lease-audit.jsonl (all roots) and agent-success-rates.jsonl. New shadcn AlertDialog primitive added. All quality gates pass (lint 0 errors, typecheck clean, 154 test files / 2134 tests pass, build succeeds). Branch: work/foolery-fc8e-reset-counters, commit: 73bf083c11da.
